tasks.title: Add FolderAccessDeniedException
tasks.description: Create lib/Exception/FolderAccessDeniedException.php extending \Exception in namespace OCA\OpenRegister\Exception with docblock explaining throw contract and HTTP 403 mapping.
acceptance_criteria: File lib/Exception/FolderAccessDeniedException.php exists
Class extends \Exception directly (not NotPermittedException)
Namespace is OCA\OpenRegister\Exception
Docblock describes when it is thrown and the HTTP 403 mapping

tasks.title: Regenerate autoloader if required
tasks.description: Run composer dump-autoload so the new class is classmap-registered.
acceptance_criteria: composer autoload resolves FolderAccessDeniedException

tasks.title: Add assertFolderIsAccessible() in FolderManagementHandler
tasks.description: Private method assertFolderIsAccessible(string $folderId, ?IUser $currentUser): Folder that resolves via getOpenRegisterUserFolder()->getById(), verifies the node exists, is a Folder, and isReadable() returns true. Does NOT use rootFolder or getNodeById(). Throws FolderAccessDeniedException with the attempted ID on any failure.
acceptance_criteria: Method exists on FolderManagementHandler as private
Signature: assertFolderIsAccessible(string $folderId, ?IUser $currentUser): Folder
Uses getOpenRegisterUserFolder()->getById() only
No reference to rootFolder or getNodeById() in this method
Verifies instanceof Folder AND isReadable()
Throws FolderAccessDeniedException on all failure paths

tasks.title: Inline comment pointing readers to getNodeById()
tasks.description: Document why the binding path deliberately avoids the root-folder fallback and point readers at getNodeById() as the general-purpose helper that retains the fallback.
acceptance_criteria: Comment block above or inside assertFolderIsAccessible() explains the design

tasks.title: Branch on getFolder() shape
tasks.description: Empty → auto-create (unchanged). Non-numeric → auto-create (legacy, unchanged). Non-empty numeric → call assertFolderIsAccessible() and use the returned Folder as the resolved existing folder.
acceptance_criteria: Numeric folder values route through assertFolderIsAccessible()
Empty values follow existing auto-create path
Non-numeric (legacy) values follow existing auto-create path

tasks.title: Remove implicit auto-create-on-invalid-ID for numeric branch
tasks.description: If assertFolderIsAccessible() throws, propagate FolderAccessDeniedException — do not fall through to the register-folder creation path.
acceptance_criteria: Numeric folder ID that fails access check surfaces the exception
No new folder is created for a failed numeric binding attempt

tasks.title: Verify getExistingFolderFromProperty() still used by other callers
tasks.description: Grep the codebase to confirm other callers of getExistingFolderFromProperty() remain intact; only the numeric user-supplied branch in createObjectFolderById() stops using it.
acceptance_criteria: grep shows remaining callers of getExistingFolderFromProperty() function correctly

tasks.title: Add logFolderAccessDenied() private method
tasks.description: Writes AuditTrailMapper entry with action: folder_access_denied, actor: $currentUser?->getUID() ?? system, metadata: {folder, timestamp}. On mapper failure, log warning but do not swallow the denial.
acceptance_criteria: Method exists as private on FolderManagementHandler
Writes AuditTrailMapper entry with action folder_access_denied
Actor resolves to UID or system fallback
Mapper failures logged at warning level only

tasks.title: Call audit method from assertFolderIsAccessible() before throw
tasks.description: Every failure path (not found, not a folder, not readable) invokes logFolderAccessDenied() immediately before throwing.
acceptance_criteria: Every throw site in assertFolderIsAccessible() is preceded by audit call

tasks.title: Verify audit is written before exception is thrown
tasks.description: Unit or integration test asserts audit entry exists after a caught denial.
acceptance_criteria: Test demonstrates audit entry present even when denial caught

tasks.title: Identify save endpoints
tasks.description: Grep lib/Controller/ObjectsController.php (and siblings) for saveObject( callsites. List endpoints that need the new catch.
acceptance_criteria: Documented list of save endpoints needing the catch

tasks.title: Catch FolderAccessDeniedException specifically
tasks.description: Catch BEFORE generic \Exception. Return JSONResponse status 403 with body {error: folder_access_denied, folder: <attempted-id>}. Prefer extending existing shared error-handler method over copy-paste try/catch.
acceptance_criteria: Catch block for FolderAccessDeniedException comes before generic \Exception
Response is HTTP 403 with JSON body containing error and folder keys

tasks.title: Confirm no upstream absorption
tasks.description: Confirm no controller base class, middleware, or AppFramework hook catches FolderAccessDeniedException as generic \Exception before the intended 403 mapping runs.
acceptance_criteria: Grep and manual trace confirms no upstream generic catch absorbs the exception

tasks.title: Grep for @self.folder / ObjectEntity::setFolder() callsites
tasks.description: Identify every caller outside FolderManagementHandler and document status: (a) always accessible ID, (b) needs explicit $currentUser, (c) clears field before save.
acceptance_criteria: Documented audit of every callsite with classification

tasks.title: Verify known callers are unaffected
tasks.description: Confirm TransferCheckJob, DestructionCheckJob, ImportService, SolrNightlyWarmupJob, NameCacheWarmupJob, RegistersLoader, etc. do not set @self.folder or otherwise regress.
acceptance_criteria: Each listed caller's behaviour unchanged and documented

tasks.title: Fix any regressing caller in the same PR
tasks.description: If audit surfaces a regression, remediate by passing $currentUser through, clearing the field before save, or routing through the HTTP 403 flow.
acceptance_criteria: All regressions fixed within this change

tasks.title: Add FolderManagementHandlerAccessControlTest
tasks.description: Cover: (a) owned folder bind succeeds; (b) shared-readable bind succeeds; (c) unshared cross-user throws; (d) non-existent ID throws; (e) file-ID throws; (f) trashed folder throws; (g) empty property auto-creates; (h) legacy non-numeric auto-creates; (i) explicit $currentUser overrides session; (j) audit entry written on each denial.
acceptance_criteria: All 10 scenarios present and green
File located at Tests/Unit/Service/File/FolderManagementHandlerAccessControlTest.php

tasks.title: Assert FolderAccessDeniedException distinctness
tasks.description: Test asserts exception extends \Exception directly and is NOT a subclass of NotPermittedException or other Nextcloud exceptions (so catch-blocks don't accidentally absorb it).
acceptance_criteria: Reflection-based test validates parent is \Exception

tasks.title: Assert ObjectsController returns HTTP 403
tasks.description: Controller-level test injects a mocked service that throws FolderAccessDeniedException and asserts status 403 with structured body.
acceptance_criteria: Test passes with status 403 and correct body structure

tasks.title: Run tests inside the Nextcloud container
tasks.description: docker exec -w /var/www/html/custom_apps/openregister nextcloud php vendor/bin/phpunit -c phpunit-unit.xml --filter FolderManagementHandlerAccessControl — confirm green.
acceptance_criteria: phpunit run inside container is green

tasks.title: Confirm unit-test coverage ≥75% for new code (ADR-009)
tasks.description: Generate coverage report for touched files and confirm threshold.
acceptance_criteria: Coverage report shows ≥75% for new code

tasks.title: Reset local env
tasks.description: bash clean-env.sh or /clean-env skill; bring full stack up.
acceptance_criteria: Clean stack running, baseline healthy

tasks.title: As alice, create folder alice-private
tasks.description: Create via Files UI, note the node ID.
acceptance_criteria: alice-private exists with recorded node ID

tasks.title: As bob, POST object with alice's folder ID
tasks.description: Confirm HTTP 403 with error: folder_access_denied in body.
acceptance_criteria: HTTP 403 returned with structured error body

tasks.title: As bob, POST without @self.folder
tasks.description: Confirm auto-create proceeds normally (HTTP 201).
acceptance_criteria: HTTP 201, folder auto-created under register folder

tasks.title: As bob, POST with own folder ID
tasks.description: Confirm HTTP 201 and returned object.folder matches.
acceptance_criteria: HTTP 201; folder field matches the supplied ID

tasks.title: Query audit trail
tasks.description: Confirm bob's denial from 8.3 is present with attempted folder ID and timestamp.
acceptance_criteria: Audit entry with action folder_access_denied retrievable

tasks.title: Audit failure does not swallow denial
tasks.description: Restart Nextcloud container with intentionally broken AuditTrailMapper (or mock the failure) and repeat 8.3. Confirm HTTP 403 still returned and warning logged.
acceptance_criteria: HTTP 403 still returned under audit failure
Warning present in logs

tasks.title: Update docs/api/objects.md
tasks.description: Document the @self.folder access-control contract: success, denial (HTTP 403 + structured body), preserved auto-create for absent/legacy values.
acceptance_criteria: docs/api/objects.md updated with access-control contract section

tasks.title: Add CHANGELOG entry flagging BREAKING
tasks.description: Next release version entry: 'Callers that set @self.folder to a node ID outside the acting user's accessible tree now receive HTTP 403 instead of a silent cross-tenant bind.'
acceptance_criteria: CHANGELOG contains BREAKING note for this behaviour

tasks.title: Note downstream consumers and follow-ups
tasks.description: Reference DocuDesk add-dossier-schema as first beneficiary and occ openregister:folder-audit follow-up as separately tracked.
acceptance_criteria: Documentation cross-references the downstream change and follow-up command

tasks.title: Run composer check:strict
tasks.description: PHPCS, PHPMD, Psalm, PHPStan — ensure no new warnings in touched files.
acceptance_criteria: composer check:strict passes with no new warnings on touched files

tasks.title: Confirm no new @SuppressWarnings annotations
tasks.description: Grep touched files for new @SuppressWarnings annotations; none introduced.
acceptance_criteria: No new @SuppressWarnings in the diff

tasks.title: Run full unit-test suite inside container
tasks.description: docker exec -w /var/www/html/custom_apps/openregister nextcloud php vendor/bin/phpunit -c phpunit-unit.xml — confirm green.
acceptance_criteria: Full unit-test suite green inside container
